sessionStart.bash: mkdir -p logs && cat >> logs/session.log && echo >> logs/session.log
sessionStart.powershell: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs | Out-Null; $input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); Add-Content -Path logs/session.log -Value $input

preToolUse.bash: mkdir -p logs && cat >> logs/tool-executions.jsonl && echo >> logs/tool-executions.jsonl
preToolUse.powershell: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs | Out-Null; $input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); Add-Content -Path logs/tool-executions.jsonl -Value $input
